name: zero123_plus_plus
description: View spec matching Zero123++ v1.2's native 6-view output (sudo-ai/zero123plus-v1.2). Use this with render_benchmark_views.py to produce a synthetic dataset that's apples-to-apples comparable with a Zero123++ mvgen run.
notes: Zero123++ alternates +30°/-20° elevation across its 6 azimuth positions. Verify against the upstream pipeline's `pipeline.cond_lat` setting if behavior changes in a future version.
